name: London Strips
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Los Angeles Times
1. In a bowl, mix flour, egg yolks, sugar, butter and vanilla, blending thoroughly.
2. Spread dough on a 16x11-inch pan and flatten it.
3. Cover the dough generously with strawberry jam.
4. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff. Gradually beat in 1 cup of sugar and bourbon.
5. Gently fold in the chopped walnuts into the beaten egg mixture.
6. Spread the walnut mixture over the dough.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 40 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar, then cut into strips when cool. Makes 3 to 4 dozen strips.
